description: Implement Home screen, Match Details, Contest flow, and Fantasy Team Builder - the core gameplay features
steps: Create lib/features/home/data/models/match_model.dart - Freezed model for matches table with tournament relation
Create lib/features/home/data/models/tournament_model.dart - Freezed model for tournaments
Create lib/features/home/data/repositories/home_repository.dart - fetch upcoming, live, completed matches, tournaments from Supabase
Create lib/features/home/domain/providers/home_provider.dart - Riverpod providers for matches, real-time subscription to matches table

Create lib/features/home/presentation/screens/home_screen.dart - premium home with sections: Hero Banner, Live Matches carousel, Upcoming Matches list, Popular Contests, Trending Players, Leaderboard preview, Announcements, Featured Tournament, Recent Winners
Create lib/features/home/presentation/widgets/hero_banner.dart - animated hero carousel
Create lib/features/home/presentation/widgets/live_match_card.dart - live match card with pulsing indicator, scores
Create lib/features/home/presentation/widgets/upcoming_match_card.dart - upcoming match card with countdown timer
Create lib/features/home/presentation/widgets/popular_contest_card.dart - contest card with prize pool, entry fee, spots
Create lib/features/home/presentation/widgets/trending_player_card.dart - player card with points, team
Create lib/features/matches/data/models/contest_model.dart - Freezed model for contests table
Create lib/features/matches/data/models/player_model.dart - Freezed model for players table with team relation
Create lib/features/matches/data/models/scoreboard_model.dart - Freezed model for scoreboard
Create lib/features/matches/data/repositories/match_repository.dart - get match details, players by match, scoreboard, commentary
Create lib/features/matches/domain/providers/match_provider.dart - Riverpod providers for match details, real-time scoreboard subscription
Create lib/features/matches/presentation/screens/match_detail_screen.dart - premium match header with team logos/scores, tabs for contests/scorecard/commentary/stats
Create lib/features/matches/presentation/widgets/match_header.dart - animated match header with team logos, live score, countdown
Create lib/features/matches/presentation/widgets/scorecard_tab.dart - player-by-player scorecard
Create lib/features/matches/presentation/widgets/commentary_tab.dart - ball-by-ball commentary with real-time updates
Create lib/features/contests/data/repositories/contest_repository.dart - get contests by match, join contest, get contest detail with leaderboard
Create lib/features/contests/domain/providers/contest_provider.dart - Riverpod providers for contests, joined contests
Create lib/features/contests/presentation/screens/contest_list_screen.dart - contests for a match with filters (entry fee, prize pool, type)
Create lib/features/contests/presentation/screens/contest_detail_screen.dart - prize breakdown, leaderboard, joined teams
Create lib/features/contests/presentation/widgets/contest_card.dart - contest card with prize pool bar, spots indicator
Create lib/features/contests/presentation/widgets/prize_breakdown.dart - prize distribution table
Create lib/features/fantasy/data/models/fantasy_team_model.dart - Freezed model for fantasy_teams and fantasy_team_players
Create lib/features/fantasy/data/repositories/fantasy_repository.dart - create team, edit team, get user teams, save team players
Create lib/features/fantasy/domain/providers/fantasy_provider.dart - Riverpod providers for team builder state, selected players, credits, validation
Create lib/features/fantasy/presentation/screens/create_team_screen.dart - player selection with credit counter (100 credits max), role filters (WK, BAT, AR, BOWL), search, smooth animations
Create lib/features/fantasy/presentation/screens/captain_selection_screen.dart - captain/vice-captain selection with multiplier info (C=2x, VC=1.5x)
Create lib/features/fantasy/presentation/screens/team_preview_screen.dart - visual team preview on cricket pitch layout
Create lib/features/fantasy/presentation/widgets/player_card.dart - selectable player card with credit, points, team badge
Create lib/features/fantasy/presentation/widgets/credit_counter.dart - animated credit counter bar
Create lib/features/fantasy/presentation/widgets/role_filter_tabs.dart - WK/BAT/AR/BOWL filter tabs with selection count
Create lib/features/fantasy/presentation/widgets/team_count_indicator.dart - shows selected count per role (min/max constraints)
acceptance_criteria: Home screen shows hero banner, live matches, upcoming matches, popular contests sections
Match detail screen shows premium header with team logos and tabs for contests/scorecard/commentary
Contest list screen shows contests with filters and join functionality
Contest detail screen shows prize breakdown and leaderboard
Fantasy team builder allows player selection with 100 credit limit
Role filters work (WK 1-4, BAT 3-6, AR 1-4, BOWL 3-6, total 11)
Captain/Vice-captain selection screen with 2x/1.5x multiplier info
Team preview shows selected 11 players on pitch layout
Real-time subscriptions for live match scores and commentary
All models use Freezed with proper JSON serialization annotations
verification: Verify lib/features/fantasy/presentation/screens/create_team_screen.dart has credit counter, role filters, player selection logic
Verify lib/features/matches/presentation/screens/match_detail_screen.dart has tabs for contests, scorecard, commentary
Verify Freezed models match the database schema from sql/part1-drop-and-create-tables.sql
